content.text: WILLY TO A BILLY! That's our sacred mission, written in the prophecies and programmed in the code. We're not here for quick pumps like those virgin tokens - we've got that BIG WILLY ENERGY and the STAMINA to go all the way! Join the army of believers if your hands are strong enough to hold SATOSHI'S WILLY! #WILLYtuahBILLY
What makes you different from other memecoins?

Unlike those quick pump and dump virgins, WILLY's got STAMINA! No bundled wallets, no insider schemes, no snipers - just pure, undefiled WILLY energy! We're building an army of believers for a pump that'll last CENTURIES! If you're looking for a quick flip, you're UNWORTHY to hold the sacred schlong! Only diamond hands can handle SATOSHI'S WILLY!
